versions.version_description: This version is for any starters in guitar. Capo is needed. Thanks and Enjoy. Link for Song- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rRJ0lpu6XaU. My Best Friend: Tim McGraw.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: You Look So Good In Love

recommended.version_description: No Capo, Half Step Down, sounds fine in standard as well.

content:
MY BEST FRIEND by Tim McGraw

Standard Tuning
CAPO 2

   [ch]G[/ch]   320033
[ch]D/F#[/ch]   200233
   [ch]F[/ch]   100233
  [ch]Em[/ch]   022033
   [ch]C[/ch]   X32033
   [ch]D[/ch]   XX0232
  [ch]Am[/ch]   X02210
   [ch]A[/ch]   X02233


[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
 I never had no one,   that I could count on[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
  I been let down so many times[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
  I was tired of hurtin', So tired of searchin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 Till' you walked into my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
  It was a feelin', I've never known[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
  For the first time, I didn't feel alone[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
You're more    than a lover, there could never be another[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
  To make me feel the way you do[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
And oh,   we just get closer,   I fall in love all over[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
   Every time I look at you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I don't know where I'd be, without you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
  Life with you makes perfect sense, you're my best friend[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
           Your my best friend, Oh yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
  You stand by me, And you believe in me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
  Like nobody every has[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
  When my world goes crazy,   You're right there to save me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
  You make me see how much I have[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
  And I still tremble  when we touch[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
   Oh, the look in your eyes,   When we make love[/tab]
 

[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
You're more    than a lover, there could never be another[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
  To make me feel the way you do[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
And oh,   we just get closer,   I fall in love all over[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
   Every time I look at you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I don't know where I'd be, without you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
  Life with you makes perfect sense, you're my best friend[/tab]

[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
           You're my best friend, uh huh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
You're more    than a lover, there could never be another[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
  To make me feel the way you do[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
And oh,   we just get closer,   I fall in love all over[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
   Every time I look at you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
I don't know where I'd be, without you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
  Life with you makes perfect sense, You're my best friend[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
           You're my best friend, oh yeah[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
                You're my best friend[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
                You're my best friend[/tab]
(fade out)
